name: Forgotten Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) and cover a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
2. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add the sugar, then stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Gently fold in the chopped pecans and chocolate chips.
5. Spoon small portions of dough onto the prepared baking sheet.
6. Place the tray in the oven and allow it to bake overnight.
7. Turn off the heat and remove the cookies from the oven the next morning.
8. Store them in a covered container.
